root_text.an10.45:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, rājā mahesiyā saddhiṁ nisinno hoti.
root_text.an10.45:1.5: Mahesī vā bhikkhuṁ disvā sitaṁ pātukaroti, bhikkhu vā mahesiṁ disvā sitaṁ pātukaroti.
root_text.an10.45:2.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rājā bahukicco bahukaraṇīyo aññataraṁ itthiṁ gantvā na sarati:
root_text.an10.45:2.4: ‘na kho idha añño koci pavisati, aññatra pabbajitena.
root_text.an10.45:3.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rañño antepure aññataraṁ ratanaṁ nassati.
root_text.an10.45:3.3: ‘na kho idha añño koci pavisati, aññatra pabbajitena.
root_text.an10.45:4.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rañño antepure abbhantarā guyhamantā bahiddhā sambhedaṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.45:4.3: ‘na kho idha añño koci pavisati, aññatra pabbajitena.
root_text.an10.45:5.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rañño antepure pitā vā puttaṁ pattheti putto vā pitaraṁ pattheti.
root_text.an10.45:5.3: ‘na kho idha añño koci pavisati, aññatra pabbajitena.
root_text.an10.45:6.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rājā nīcaṭṭhāniyaṁ ucce ṭhāne ṭhapeti.
root_text.an10.45:6.2: Yesaṁ taṁ amanāpaṁ tesaṁ evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an10.45:7.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rājā uccaṭṭhāniyaṁ nīce ṭhāne ṭhapeti.
root_text.an10.45:7.2: Yesaṁ taṁ amanāpaṁ tesaṁ evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an10.45:8.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rājā akāle senaṁ uyyojeti.
root_text.an10.45:8.2: Yesaṁ taṁ amanāpaṁ tesaṁ evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an10.45:9.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rājā kāle senaṁ uyyojetvā antarāmaggato nivattāpeti.
root_text.an10.45:9.2: Yesaṁ taṁ amanāpaṁ tesaṁ evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an10.45:10.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rañño antepuraṁ hatthisammaddaṁ assasammaddaṁ rathasammaddaṁ rajanīyāni rūpasaddagandharasaphoṭṭhabbāni, yāni na pabbajitassa sāruppāni.
root_text.an10.45:10.3: Ime kho, bhikkhave, dasa ādīnavā rājantepurappavesane”ti.

translation_text.an10.45:1.1: “Mendicants, there are ten drawbacks to entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:1.3: Firstly, a king is sitting with his chief queen
translation_text.an10.45:1.5: When the queen sees the monk she smiles, or when the monk sees the queen he smiles.
translation_text.an10.45:1.7: ‘They’ve done it for sure, or they will do it.’
translation_text.an10.45:1.8: This is the first drawback of entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:2.1: Furthermore, a king has many duties, and much to do. He has sex with one of the women but doesn’t remember.
translation_text.an10.45:2.4: ‘No-one else has entered here, except for that monk.
translation_text.an10.45:2.5: Could this be the monk’s doing?’
translation_text.an10.45:2.6: This is the second drawback of entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:3.1: Furthermore, a gem is lost somewhere in the royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:3.3: ‘No-one else has entered here, except for that monk.
translation_text.an10.45:3.4: Could this be the monk’s doing?’
translation_text.an10.45:3.5: This is the third drawback of entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:4.1: Furthermore, secret deliberations in the royal compound are leaked outside.
translation_text.an10.45:4.3: ‘No-one else has entered here, except for that monk.
translation_text.an10.45:4.4: Could this be the monk’s doing?’
translation_text.an10.45:4.5: This is the fourth drawback of entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:5.1: Furthermore, in a royal compound, a father longs for their son, or a son longs for his father.
translation_text.an10.45:5.3: ‘No-one else has entered here, except for that monk.
translation_text.an10.45:5.4: Could this be the monk’s doing?’
translation_text.an10.45:5.5: This is the fifth drawback of entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:6.1: Furthermore, the king promotes someone to a higher position.
translation_text.an10.45:6.2: Those who are upset by this think:
translation_text.an10.45:6.3: ‘The king is close to that monk.
translation_text.an10.45:6.4: Could this be the monk’s doing?’
translation_text.an10.45:6.5: This is the sixth drawback of entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:7.1: Furthermore, the king demotes someone to a lower position.
translation_text.an10.45:7.2: Those who are upset by this think:
translation_text.an10.45:7.3: ‘The king is close to that monk.
translation_text.an10.45:7.4: Could this be the monk’s doing?’
translation_text.an10.45:7.5: This is the seventh drawback of entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:8.1: Furthermore, the king dispatches the army at the wrong time.
translation_text.an10.45:8.2: Those who are upset by this think:
translation_text.an10.45:8.3: ‘The king is close to that monk.
translation_text.an10.45:8.4: Could this be the monk’s doing?’
translation_text.an10.45:8.5: This is the eighth drawback of entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:9.1: Furthermore, the king dispatches the army at the right time, but orders it to turn back while still on the road.
translation_text.an10.45:9.2: Those who are upset by this think:
translation_text.an10.45:9.3: ‘The king is close to that monk.
translation_text.an10.45:9.4: Could this be the monk’s doing?’
translation_text.an10.45:9.5: This is the ninth drawback of entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:10.1: Furthermore, in the royal compound there is a trampling of elephants, horses, and chariots, as well as arousing sights, sounds, smells, tastes, and touches that do not befit a monk.
translation_text.an10.45:10.2: This is the tenth drawback of entering a royal compound.
translation_text.an10.45:10.3: These are the ten drawbacks of entering a royal compound.”
